reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the release years for Tonka and 101 Dalmatians.
2. Compare the decades of the release years and return whether the films were released in the same decade.
original_final_question: Were the films Tonka and 101 Dalmatians released in the same decade? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Tonka was released in 1958, while the live-action 101 Dalmatians was released in 1996, so they were not released in the same decade. -> no
